pricing.hero_title:
161 pro calculators.
Pay only for what you use.
pricing.hero_sub: No subscription. No auto-renewal. Credits valid 12 months — use them on your schedule, not ours.
pricing.value_anchor: One calculation can reveal what four hours of manual work misses.
pricing.value_sub: A single OEE analysis typically surfaces $40,000–$120,000 in hidden production losses. A scrap cost audit pays for itself in the first result.
pricing.credit_what_body: One credit unlocks one pro calculation. Enter your real factory data, get a structured result — including professional PDF export — backed by the correct industrial formula. Credits don't expire for 12 months.
pricing.what_unlocks_sub: Pro tools go beyond the formula — they model your real operating parameters.
pricing.step1_body: Choose a pack. Instant delivery to your account.
pricing.step2_body: Enter your actual machine, material, or process data.
pricing.step3_body: Structured output with PDF export. Backed by the correct industrial standard.
pricing.why_not_sub_title: Built for engineering decisions, not SaaS metrics
pricing.why_not_sub_body: A subscription forces a monthly payment whether you have an audit this month or not. Credits let you run 15 calculations in a single day when you're doing a full line review, and nothing in a quiet month. Your factory's pace, not a billing cycle.

faq.q: Can I use credits across different industry sectors?
faq.a: Yes. One credit works for any pro tool in any sector — OEE in manufacturing, CPM in construction, ESG in energy. Credits are not sector-locked.
Credits are valid for 12 months from the date of purchase. This gives you a full annual planning cycle without pressure.

faq.q: Can multiple team members use the same account?
faq.a: Currently credits are account-linked. For shared team access, purchase credits on a shared account. Enterprise team features are on the roadmap.
All free-tier tools are available without login. Pro tools require a credit. The 1-credit Trial pack lets you test a single pro tool at the lowest entry point.

faq.q: What does the PDF export include?
faq.a: The PDF includes your input parameters, the result, the formula applied, the applicable standard or norm, and interpretation guidance. Suitable for internal sign-off and client reporting.
Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and major digital payment methods via Stripe. All transactions are in USD.

tier_use_15: OEE + scrap + downtime in one cycle

free_tools.hero_sub: Engineering-grade tools. No login required. Instant results.
free_tools.pro_upsell_body: Pro tools include real parameter inputs, PDF export, and industrial standards. From $1.99.

pro_tools.hero_title: 161 calculators built for real engineering decisions.
pro_tools.hero_sub: Pro tools accept your actual operating data. Results include professional PDF export and applicable industrial standards. Each tool costs one credit.
pro_tools.feature_1_body: Enter your actual machine speed, material cost, or process temperature — not generic defaults.
pro_tools.feature_2_body: Every result exports to a structured PDF. Suitable for internal reports and client documentation.
pro_tools.feature_3_body: Results cite the applicable norm: ISO, ASME, Lean Six Sigma, HACCP, and more.
pro_tools.feature_4_body: Pro tools don't just calculate — they show the financial impact of the result on your operation.
